CustomField.description: Date the Billing training webinar was completed. Formula field to pull this value from related account record.
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(Account__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c)), ISBLANK(Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c) ), Account__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c, IF( AND( ISBLANK(Account__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c), NOT(ISBLANK(Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c)) ), Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c, IF( Account__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c > Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c, Account__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c, Primary_Contact__r.Webinar_2_Completed_Date__c ) ) )
CustomField.label: Webinar 2 Completed Date
